content.intro: The mydeposits integration enables PropertyGoose to register deposits with mydeposits automatically and generate the prescribed information document for tenants.

steps.title: Go to Settings → Deposits → mydeposits
steps.content: Navigate to Settings, open the Deposits section, and find the mydeposits integration panel.

steps.title: Enter Your mydeposits API Credentials
steps.content: Enter your mydeposits API credentials. These are available from your mydeposits account portal.

steps.title: Save
steps.content: Click Save to store your credentials and activate the integration.

steps.title: Select mydeposits When Setting Up Initial Monies
steps.content: When creating initial monies for a tenancy, select mydeposits as the deposit protection scheme from the dropdown.

steps.title: Deposit Registered and Prescribed Information Generated
steps.content: PropertyGoose registers the deposit with mydeposits automatically and generates the prescribed information document, which can be sent to tenants via the compliance pack.

sections.title: Insured vs Custodial Protection
sections.content: mydeposits supports both insured deposit protection (agent holds the deposit funds) and custodial deposit protection (mydeposits holds the deposit funds). Select the correct type to match your mydeposits account setup when configuring the integration.
